value.name: Idli (4 pcs)

value.name: Masala Dosa
value.aiDescription: Golden-brown, paper-thin crepe filled with a savory blend of spiced potatoes. A masterclass in crunch.

value.name: Tomato Pappu + Rice
value.aiDescription: Traditional Andhra-style lentils infused with tangy tomatoes. Fluffy basmati rice.

value.name: Chicken Curry + Rice
value.aiDescription: Tender chicken simmered in a rich, spicy gravy of toasted spices. Pure comfort.

value.name: Veg Meals
